title: Parent kept in sync with a callback effect
message: Your parent re-renders on every local state change because this useEffect calls the prop "onValidationChange" just to stay in sync.
help: Move the shared state into a Provider so both sides read the same value. Then you don't need a useEffect to keep them in sync.
